name: JSON2Video
description: Programmatic video generation with JSON2Video API

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your JSON2Video API key from https://json2video.com/dashboard

j2v_render.description: Submit a video render job. Returns project ID immediately. Use webhook parameter for completion callbacks.

record_id.title: Record ID
record_id.description: Custom ID to track this render job (returned in webhook callback)

movie_id.title: Movie ID
movie_id.description: Custom identifier for the video project

variables.title: Variables
variables.description: Global variables accessible throughout the project via {{var.name}} syntax

client_data.title: Client Data
client_data.description: Custom data returned in webhook callback (useful for tracking)

elements.title: Subtitles
elements.description: Subtitle element applied across all scenes. Auto-transcribes audio when language is set.

model.title: Transcription Model
model.description: AI model for automatic speech recognition

src.title: Subtitle File URL
src.description: URL to SRT or VTT file (leave empty for auto-transcription)

captions.title: Manual Captions
captions.description: Captions in ASS format (alternative to auto-transcription or src)

scenes.title: Scenes
scenes.description: Video scenes containing elements. When mapped to an array, enable 'Iterate over array' to process each scene sequentially.

duration.title: Duration (seconds)
duration.description: Scene duration. Use -1 for intrinsic duration from elements.

elements.title: Elements
elements.description: Visual and audio elements in this scene. Can be auto-expanded when fields are mapped to arrays.

src.title: Source URL
src.description: URL to video, image, audio, or HTML file

prompt.title: AI Prompt
prompt.description: Generate image with AI (alternative to src)

html.title: HTML Code
html.description: HTML snippet to render (alternative to src)

start.title: Start Time (seconds)
start.description: When element appears in the scene

z_index.title: Z-Index (Layer)
z_index.description: Layer order (-99 to 99, higher = on top)

resize.title: Resize Mode
resize.description: How to resize element to fit dimensions

connection.title: Voice Connection
connection.description: Connection ID for custom TTS API key

ai_connection.title: AI Connection
ai_connection.description: Connection ID for custom AI API key

mask.title: Mask URL
mask.description: Mask image URL for transparency effects

chroma_key.title: Chroma Key Settings
chroma_key.description: Green screen settings (JSON with color, tolerance)

correction.title: Color Correction
correction.description: Color correction (JSON with brightness, contrast, etc.)

tailwindcss.title: Enable TailwindCSS
tailwindcss.description: Enable TailwindCSS framework for HTML snippet

wait.title: Wait Time (seconds)
wait.description: Time to wait before taking screenshot (0-5)

condition.title: Condition
condition.description: Expression for conditional rendering (e.g., '{{ show_logo == true }}')

cache.title: Cache
cache.description: Enable caching for faster re-renders of unchanged content

draft.title: Draft Mode
draft.description: Render low-quality preview (faster, no credits consumed)

exports.title: Export Destinations
exports.description: Where to deliver the completed video

webhook_url.title: Webhook URL
webhook_url.description: URL to receive callback when rendering completes

result_schema.description: Immediate response with project ID. Use poll_service or get_video to check completion status.

project.description: Project ID for tracking the render job

status_url.description: Ready-to-use URL for checking job status

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the job was created

scenes.title: Scenes & Elements
scenes.description: Build your video with scenes and elements

export.title: Export Destinations
export.description: Where to deliver completed videos (webhook, FTP, email)

j2v_get_video.description: Get the status and details of a rendered video. Returns download URL, subtitles, dimensions, and rendering metadata when complete.

project.title: Project ID
project.description: The project ID returned from the Generate Video service

ui.placeholder: Enter project ID from render response

success.description: Whether the API request was successful
Whether the video rendering was successful

status.description: Job status: pending (queued), running (rendering), done (complete), error (failed)

message.description: Status message or error details (check this when status is 'error')

url.description: Video download URL (only present when status is 'done')

ass.description: Subtitles download URL in ASS format (only present when status is 'done' and subtitles were generated)

created_at.description: When the render job was initiated

ended_at.description: When the render job completed (null if still processing)

rendering_time.description: Time taken to render the video in seconds

time.description: Remaining render time credits in seconds
